text: "Hello?" "Hello?" "Good morning, my name is Julia. I'm just checking something as per our records from your local county in the state of Arizona. So just quickly, both Part A and B of your Medicare are currently active, right?" "No, I'm not Medicare." "Can you hear me?" "I was asking if you have Part A and B of Medicare." "Well, I was asking if you both Part A and B of Medicare?" "No, Medicare." Sorry.
